text-to-text.title: Text to Text Pipeline (LLM Response Generation)
text-to-text.description: How user text prompt is sent to backend, processed by LLM (Gemini/Groq/Ollama), and returned as text answer.
flow: 1. User enters text prompt in frontend chat input.
2. Frontend creates FormData with mode='text', query=prompt, output_format='text'.
3. Frontend sends POST request to FastAPI backend endpoint /api/chat.
4. Backend gets selected model (e.g. gemini-2.5-flash) and calls get_chat_models().
5. LLM model.invoke(query) generates AI response string.
6. Backend returns JSON payload: { status, mode, response }.
7. Frontend receives JSON and renders new text message in Chat UI.
text-to-text.backend_code:
# Step 1: FastAPI route receives incoming form parameters
@router.post('/chat')
async def chat(
    mode: str = Form(...),
    query: str = Form(''),
    model_name: Optional[str] = Form('gemini-2.5-flash'),
    output_format: str = Form('text')
):
    # Step 2: Validate mode and resolve model instance (Google / Ollama / Groq)
    text_model = get_model_for_task(model_name, 'text', 'gemini-2.5-flash')
    model_instance = get_chat_models(text_model)

    # Step 3: Pass user prompt to LLM and generate raw response
    raw_response = model_instance.invoke(query)

    # Step 4: Extract and clean final text content from model response object
    ai_response = _normalize_response(raw_response)

    # Step 5: Return structured JSON payload to frontend UI
    return {
        'status': 'success',
        'mode': 'text',
        'response': ai_response,
        'output_format': 'text'
    }

text.title: Text to Text Pipeline (LLM Response Generation)
text.description: How user text prompt is sent to backend, processed by LLM (Gemini/Groq/Ollama), and returned as text answer.
flow: 1. User enters text prompt in frontend chat input.

5. LLM model.invoke(query) generates AI response string.
6. Backend returns JSON payload: { status, mode, response }.
7. Frontend receives JSON and renders new text message in Chat UI.

# Step 1: FastAPI route receives incoming form parameters
@router.post('/chat')
async def chat(
    mode: str = Form(...),
    query: str = Form(''),
    model_name: Optional[str] = Form('gemini-2.5-flash'),
    output_format: str = Form('text')
):
    # Step 2: Validate mode and resolve model instance (Google / Ollama / Groq)
    text_model = get_model_for_task(model_name, 'text', 'gemini-2.5-flash')
    model_instance = get_chat_models(text_model)

    # Step 3: Pass user prompt to LLM and generate raw response
    raw_response = model_instance.invoke(query)

    # Step 4: Extract and clean final text content from model response object
    ai_response = _normalize_response(raw_response)

    # Step 5: Return structured JSON payload to frontend UI
    return {
        'status': 'success',
        'mode': 'text',
        'response': ai_response,
        'output_format': 'text'
    }

text-to-image.title: Text to Image Pipeline (FLUX.1 Image Synthesis)
text-to-image.description: How text prompt is sent to backend, generated using Hugging Face FLUX model, saved to disk, and rendered as image.
flow: 1. User types image description prompt (e.g., 'A cyberpunk city at sunset').
2. Frontend sets mode='text' and output_format='image' in FormData.
3. Frontend sends POST request to FastAPI backend /api/chat.
4. Backend calls Hugging Face InferenceClient text_to_image API with prompt.
5. Generated image PIL object is saved into backend/image_outputs/ directory.
6. Backend returns JSON with image static file URL (/outputs/images/filename.png).
7. Frontend renders generated image preview directly inside Chat UI.
text-to-image.backend_code:
# Step 1: Detect when output_format parameter is 'image'
if output_format == 'image':
    if not query.strip():
        raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail='Text prompt required for image.')

    # Step 2: Resolve image model and call Hugging Face InferenceClient API
    image_model = get_model_for_task(model_name, 'image_generation', 'black-forest-labs/FLUX.1-schnell')
    client = InferenceClient(api_key=os.getenv('HUGGINGFACE_API_KEY'))
    
    # Step 3: Synthesize image PIL object from text prompt
    image_obj = client.text_to_image(prompt=query, model=image_model)
    
    # Step 4: Save image file locally under backend/image_outputs/
    filename = f'generated_{uuid.uuid4().hex[:8]}.png'
    output_path = IMAGE_OUTPUT_DIR / filename
    image_obj.save(str(output_path))

    # Step 5: Return static image URL path to frontend for display
    return {
        'status': 'success',
        'mode': 'text',
        'response': 'Image generated successfully.',
        'output_format': 'image',
        'image_file': f'/outputs/images/{filename}'
    }

text-to-speech.title: Text to Speech Pipeline (Audio Response)
text-to-speech.description: How text response is generated by LLM and converted into audio speech file for listening.
flow: 1. User enters text prompt and sets output format to audio.
2. Frontend posts FormData with mode='text' and output_format='audio'.
3. Backend calls LLM to generate response text.
4. Backend calls TTS service (text_to_speech) to convert text into MP3 audio.
5. Backend saves audio under audio_outputs/ directory.
6. Backend returns response text and static audio URL (/outputs/audio/filename.mp3).
7. Frontend renders audio player controls in Chat UI.
text-to-speech.backend_code:
# Step 1: Process text prompt through LLM first
ai_response = process_text(query, text_model)

# Step 2: Synthesize text response into audio MP3 file if output_format is 'audio'
if output_format == 'audio':
    audio_file = text_to_speech(ai_response)
    audio_url = output_url(audio_file, 'audio') if audio_file else None
    return build_response('text', ai_response, 'audio', audio_file=audio_url)

image-to-text.title: Image to Text Pipeline (Vision AI Analysis)
image-to-text.description: How user uploads an image with a prompt, and Gemini Vision model analyzes image content.
flow: 1. User selects an image file and types an optional prompt.
2. Frontend attaches file to FormData with mode='image'.
3. Backend saves uploaded image file temporarily.
4. Backend converts image to Base64 data URL and passes HumanMessage to Vision LLM.
5. Gemini-2.5-pro vision model analyzes image content and generates text description.
6. Backend returns AI text analysis back to frontend.
image-to-text.backend_code:
# Step 1: Handle mode == 'image' in FastAPI route handler
if mode == 'image':
    file_path = await save_upload_file(file)
    vision_model = get_model_for_task(model_name, 'vision', 'gemini-2.5-pro')
    
    # Step 2: Encode image to Base64 and send message payload to vision model
    ai_response = process_image(file_path, query or 'Describe this image.', vision_model)
    return build_response('image', ai_response)

speech-to-text.title: Speech to Text Pipeline (Whisper Audio Transcription)
speech-to-text.description: How user audio input is uploaded, transcribed using Whisper STT, and answered by AI.
flow: 1. User uploads audio recording or voice file.
2. Frontend attaches file with mode='audio' in FormData.
3. Backend saves audio file and calls Whisper model for speech recognition.
4. Whisper transcribes spoken speech into text.
5. LLM processes transcribed question and returns final answer text.
6. Backend returns response JSON back to frontend.
speech-to-text.backend_code:
# Step 1: Handle mode == 'audio'
if mode == 'audio':
    file_path = await save_upload_file(file)
    speech_model = get_model_for_task(model_name, 'speech', 'whisper-large-v3')
    
    # Step 2: Transcribe audio to text via Whisper and query LLM
    ai_response = process_audio(file_path, query, speech_model)
    return build_response('audio', ai_response)
